rows.indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX appointments_doctor_slot_uq ON public.appointments USING btree (doctor_id, scheduled_at) WHERE (status = ANY (ARRAY['scheduled'::appointment_status, 'confirmed'::appointment_status, 'pending'::appointment_status, 'accepted'::appointment_status]))
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX patients_doctor_email_uq ON public.patients USING btree (doctor_id, email) WHERE (email IS NOT NULL)
